meaning: Bay of 比斯开湾(在伊比利亚半岛和法国的布列塔尼半岛之间)
examples: This left the Bay of Biscay as a failed rift.
They sailed through the Bay of Biscay.
The North Sea, the Baltic and Celtic-Biscay shelf fisheries are all still declining.
The nearest confirmed great white sighting to the UK has been in the Bay of Biscay.
And Ms. Able reports that Cleo's sister, Treasures Biscay's Sapphire, aka Isis, is due in early June.
